## Infrastructure Nodes

| Name | Type | Trust | Protocol | Auth |
|------|------|-------|----------|------|
| `android_client` | `edge_mobile(android)` | untrusted | — | — |
| `web_client` | `edge_desktop` | untrusted | — | — |
| `api_backend` | `server` | trusted | https | jwt |
| `postgres_db` | `postgres` | trusted | — | — |
| `cache` | `redis` | trusted | — | — |
| `object_store` | `s3_bucket` | trusted | — | — |

## Code Components

These logical components map your code files to the architecture nodes above.

### `ApiControllers`
- **File glob**: `web/api/Controllers/**/*.cs`
- **Rules affecting this component:**
  - [LayeredBackend] **FORBIDDEN**: `ApiControllers` must NOT directly access `postgres_db`
  - [LayeredBackend] **FORBIDDEN**: `ApiControllers` must NOT directly access `cache`
  - [LayeredBackend] **FORBIDDEN**: `ApiControllers` must NOT directly access `object_store`

### `ApiServices`
- **File glob**: `web/api/Services/**/*.cs`

### `DataLayer`
- **File glob**: `web/api/Data/**/*.cs`

### `VpsSessionService`
- **File glob**: `web/api/Services/Vps/**/*.cs`
- **Rules affecting this component:**
  - [VpsSessionAccess] **FORBIDDEN**: `VpsSessionService` must NOT directly access `postgres_db`

### `AndroidFeatures`
- **File glob**: `android/feature/**/*.kt`
- **Rules affecting this component:**
  - [LayeredAndroid] **FORBIDDEN**: `AndroidFeatures` must NOT directly access `api_backend`

### `AndroidNetworkLayer`
- **File glob**: `android/core/network/**/*.kt`

### `CreatorUi`
- **File glob**: `creator-ui/src/**/*.ts`

## Architectural Invariants

These are universal laws — they apply to ALL code, not just tests.

### `LayeredBackend`
- **FORBIDDEN**: `ApiControllers` must NOT directly access `postgres_db`
- **FORBIDDEN**: `ApiControllers` must NOT directly access `cache`
- **FORBIDDEN**: `ApiControllers` must NOT directly access `object_store`

### `VpsSessionAccess`
- **FORBIDDEN**: `VpsSessionService` must NOT directly access `postgres_db`

### `LayeredAndroid`
- **FORBIDDEN**: `AndroidFeatures` must NOT directly access `api_backend`

## Domain Enums

Use these exact values in your code. The solver knows about them.

### `VpsStatus`
Values: `Pending` | `Provisioning` | `Running` | `Stopped` | `Failed` | `Terminated`

### `VpsRole`
Values: `Owner` | `Collaborator`

### `VpsSubscriptionStatus`
Values: `Active` | `Suspended` | `Revoked`

### `OrderStatus`
Values: `Created` | `Pending` | `Processing` | `Fulfilled` | `Cancelled` | `Refunded`

### `UserRole`
Values: `Guest` | `Member` | `Admin` | `SuperAdmin`

### `PaymentStatus`
Values: `Initiated` | `Authorized` | `Captured` | `Failed` | `Refunded` | `Disputed`

## State Machine Rules

> ⚠️ **Advisory rules** — not yet Z3-enforced at commit time, but you MUST follow these.
> Agents: do NOT write code that performs transitions not listed as `allow` here.

### `OrderLifecycle` — `Order.status`

**Allowed transitions:**
- `Created` → `Pending`
- `Pending` → `Processing`
- `Processing` → `Fulfilled`
- `Processing` → `Cancelled`
- `Fulfilled` → `Refunded`

**Explicitly forbidden transitions:**
- ~~`Created` → `Fulfilled`~~ ❌
- ~~`Pending` → `Fulfilled`~~ ❌
- ~~`Cancelled` → `*`~~ ❌
- ~~`Refunded` → `*`~~ ❌

### `VpsLifecycle` — `VpsInstance.status`

**Allowed transitions:**
- `Pending` → `Provisioning`
- `Provisioning` → `Running`
- `Provisioning` → `Failed`
- `Running` → `Stopped`
- `Stopped` → `Running`
- `Running` → `Terminated`
- `Stopped` → `Terminated`

**Explicitly forbidden transitions:**
- ~~`Terminated` → `*`~~ ❌
- ~~`Failed` → `Running`~~ ❌

### `VpsSubscriptionLifecycle` — `VpsSubscription.status`

**Allowed transitions:**
- `Active` → `Suspended`
- `Suspended` → `Active`
- `Active` → `Revoked`
- `Suspended` → `Revoked`

**Explicitly forbidden transitions:**
- ~~`Revoked` → `*`~~ ❌

### `PaymentLifecycle` — `Payment.status`

**Allowed transitions:**
- `Initiated` → `Authorized`
- `Authorized` → `Captured`
- `Authorized` → `Failed`
- `Captured` → `Refunded`
- `Captured` → `Disputed`

**Explicitly forbidden transitions:**
- ~~`Failed` → `*`~~ ❌
- ~~`Initiated` → `Captured`~~ ❌

## Permission Rules

> ⚠️ **Advisory rules** — not yet Z3-enforced at commit time, but you MUST follow these.
> Agents: implement all access control checks according to these rules.

### `VpsAccess` — on `VpsInstance`

| Role | Operations | Condition | Effect |
|------|------------|-----------|--------|
| `UserRole.Admin` | `read`, `write`, `delete` | — | ✅ allow |
| `UserRole.Member` | `read`, `write` | when `owner_id` | ✅ allow |
| `UserRole.Member` | `read`, `write` | when `id` | ✅ allow |
| `UserRole.Guest` | `*` | — | ❌ deny |

### `VpsSubscriptionAccess` — on `VpsSubscription`

| Role | Operations | Condition | Effect |
|------|------------|-----------|--------|
| `UserRole.Admin` | `read`, `write`, `delete` | — | ✅ allow |
| `UserRole.Member` | `read` | when `user_id` | ✅ allow |
| `UserRole.Member` | `write` | — | ❌ deny |
| `UserRole.Guest` | `*` | — | ❌ deny |

### `OrderAccess` — on `Order`

| Role | Operations | Condition | Effect |
|------|------------|-----------|--------|
| `UserRole.Admin` | `read`, `write`, `delete` | — | ✅ allow |
| `UserRole.Member` | `read`, `write` | when `customer_id` | ✅ allow |
| `UserRole.Guest` | `*` | — | ❌ deny |

### `PaymentAccess` — on `Payment`

| Role | Operations | Condition | Effect |
|------|------------|-----------|--------|
| `UserRole.Admin` | `read`, `write` | — | ✅ allow |
| `UserRole.Member` | `read` | when `order_id` | ✅ allow |
| `UserRole.Guest` | `*` | — | ❌ deny |
